testcase.name: test_invalid_license_plate

failure.message: TypeError: dmr.models.vehicle.Vehicle() argument after ** must be a mapping, not coroutine

testcase.failure:
def test_invalid_license_plate(): > dmr_obj = DMR.get_by_plate(license_plate="GGGGGGG") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_dmr_methods.py:15: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
cls = <class 'dmr.dmr.DMR'>, license_plate = 'GGGGGGG'
@classmethod def get_by_plate(cls, license_plate: str) -> Optional[Vehicle]: """Get data from DMR by license plate.
Args: license_plate (str): The license plate to look up. Not required if license plate was passed into the DMR object.
Raises: InvalidLicensePlate: Invalid license plate was given
Returns: DMR: DMR object is returned, check https://github.com/j4asper/dmr.py/wiki for more information. """
if not cls.validate_license_plate(license_plate): raise errors.InvalidLicensePlate("Invalid license plate. license plate length should be between 2 and 7 letters and/or digits.")
data = scrape(license_plate=license_plate) if data: > return Vehicle(**data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: dmr.models.vehicle.Vehicle() argument after ** must be a mapping, not coroutine
dmr/dmr.py:51: TypeError

testcase.name: test_invalid_license_plate_async

failure.message: aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorCertificateError: Cannot connect to host motorregister.skat.dk:443 ssl:True [SSLCertVerificationError: (1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: self-signed certificate in certificate chain (_ssl.c:1006)')]

testcase.failure:
self = <aiohttp.connector.TCPConnector object at 0x1053ca4d0> req = <aiohttp.client_reqrep.ClientRequest object at 0x105866050> timeout = ClientTimeout(total=300, connect=None, sock_read=None, sock_connect=None, ceil_threshold=5) client_error = <class 'aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorError'> args = (functools.partial(<class 'aiohttp.client_proto.ResponseHandler'>, loop=<_UnixSelectorEventLoop running=False closed=False debug=False>), '5.44.137.81', 443) kwargs = {'family': <AddressFamily.AF_INET: 2>, 'flags': <AddressInfo.AI_NUMERICHOST|AI_NUMERICSERV: 4100>, 'local_addr': None, 'proto': 6, ...}
async def _wrap_create_connection( self, *args: Any, req: ClientRequest, timeout: "ClientTimeout", client_error: Type[Exception] = ClientConnectorError, **kwargs: Any, ) -> Tuple[asyncio.Transport, ResponseHandler]: try: async with ceil_timeout( timeout.sock_connect, ceil_threshold=timeout.ceil_threshold ): > return await self._loop.create_connection(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1025: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:1112: in create_connection transport, protocol = await self._create_connection_transport( /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:1145: in _create_connection_transport await waiter /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/sslproto.py:575: in _on_handshake_complete raise handshake_exc /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/sslproto.py:557: in _do_handshake self._sslobj.do_handshake() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ssl.SSLObject object at 0x105882d90>
def do_handshake(self): """Start the SSL/TLS handshake.""" > self._sslobj.do_handshake() E ssl.SSLCertVerificationError: [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: self-signed certificate in certificate chain (_ssl.c:1006)
/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/ssl.py:979: SSLCertVerificationError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
def test_invalid_license_plate_async(): loop = asyncio.new_event_loop() > dmr_obj = loop.run_until_complete(DMR.get_by_plate_async("GGGGGGG")) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_dmr_methods.py:20: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ dmr/dmr.py:74: in get_by_plate_async data = await scrape_async(license_plate=license_plate) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ dmr/utils/async_scraper.py:21: in scrape_async token, new_url = await get_token(session) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ dmr/utils/async_scraper.py:10: in get_token async with session.get("https://motorregister.skat.dk/dmr-kerne/koeretoejdetaljer/visKoeretoej", headers=get_headers(), allow_redirects=True) as resp: .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:1197: in __aenter__ self._resp = await self._coro ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:581: in _request conn = await self._connector.connect( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:544: in connect proto = await self._create_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:944: in _create_connection _, proto = await self._create_direct_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1257: in _create_direct_connection raise last_exc .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1226: in _create_direct_connection transp, proto = await self._wrap_create_connection( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <aiohttp.connector.TCPConnector object at 0x1053ca4d0> req = <aiohttp.client_reqrep.ClientRequest object at 0x105866050> timeout = ClientTimeout(total=300, connect=None, sock_read=None, sock_connect=None, ceil_threshold=5) client_error = <class 'aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorError'> args = (functools.partial(<class 'aiohttp.client_proto.ResponseHandler'>, loop=<_UnixSelectorEventLoop running=False closed=False debug=False>), '5.44.137.81', 443) kwargs = {'family': <AddressFamily.AF_INET: 2>, 'flags': <AddressInfo.AI_NUMERICHOST|AI_NUMERICSERV: 4100>, 'local_addr': None, 'proto': 6, ...}
async def _wrap_create_connection( self, *args: Any, req: ClientRequest, timeout: "ClientTimeout", client_error: Type[Exception] = ClientConnectorError, **kwargs: Any, ) -> Tuple[asyncio.Transport, ResponseHandler]: try: async with ceil_timeout( timeout.sock_connect, ceil_threshold=timeout.ceil_threshold ): return await self._loop.create_connection(*args, **kwargs) except cert_errors as exc: > raise ClientConnectorCertificateError(req.connection_key, exc) from exc E aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorCertificateError: Cannot connect to host motorregister.skat.dk:443 ssl:True [SSLCertVerificationError: (1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: self-signed certificate in certificate chain (_ssl.c:1006)')]
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1027: ClientConnectorCertificateError

testcase.name: test_dmr_object_normal_car

failure.message: TypeError: dmr.models.vehicle.Vehicle() argument after ** must be a mapping, not coroutine

testcase.failure:
def test_dmr_object_normal_car(): > dmr, expected = get_object_for_comparison("cw87553", False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_dmr_object.py:5: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/helper_methods.py:12: in get_object_for_comparison vehicle = DMR.get_by_plate(license_plate) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
cls = <class 'dmr.dmr.DMR'>, license_plate = 'cw87553'
@classmethod def get_by_plate(cls, license_plate: str) -> Optional[Vehicle]: """Get data from DMR by license plate.
Args: license_plate (str): The license plate to look up. Not required if license plate was passed into the DMR object.
Raises: InvalidLicensePlate: Invalid license plate was given
Returns: DMR: DMR object is returned, check https://github.com/j4asper/dmr.py/wiki for more information. """
if not cls.validate_license_plate(license_plate): raise errors.InvalidLicensePlate("Invalid license plate. license plate length should be between 2 and 7 letters and/or digits.")
data = scrape(license_plate=license_plate) if data: > return Vehicle(**data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: dmr.models.vehicle.Vehicle() argument after ** must be a mapping, not coroutine
dmr/dmr.py:51: TypeError

testcase.name: test_dmr_object_motorcycle

failure.message: aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorCertificateError: Cannot connect to host motorregister.skat.dk:443 ssl:True [SSLCertVerificationError: (1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: self-signed certificate in certificate chain (_ssl.c:1006)')]

testcase.failure:
